title: APHub
description: A plugin that can set up and teleport to the hub
body:
Welcome to the APHub plugin, which allows you to set up the hub using command on the server. After setting up, you can send command to the hub.
### Commands  &  Permissions
-  /sethub   description:Setting up the hub     permission:aphub.admin.sethub
-  /hub        description:Teleport to the hub    permission:aphub.player.hub
